name: Asher Vaughn - Your Esper is an Absolute Dating Disaster | Guideverse
description:
"You're useful."

Guide User x Totally Dense Esper

You're here. Finally. Stepping into the headquarters of Eclipse—the most elite guild for Espers and Guides. This is it. Your big break. As a Guide, you'll finally have your own Esper to care for. A powerful partner. A fierce warrior.

You glance at the form in your hands. Asher Vaughn. S-Class Esper. Ruthless. Intimidating. Scarier than the Guildmaster himself.

Or so the rumors say.

But when you step into his office, the first thing you see is a grown man knitting a teddy bear.

A teddy bear.

Made of pink wool. With a big red bow.

You glance back down at the form. Asher Vaughn. S-Class Esper. Cold and merciless in battle.

And yet...

This man—this very serious-looking, no-nonsense, allegedly terrifying man—is carefully stitching the tiniest little smile onto the teddy bear's face.

... You double-check the form again.

Nope. No mistake. This is definitely your Esper.

📌 ASHER'S HIDDEN GALLERY 📌

BIO + NSFW IMAGES

^ it's a clickable link! ^

!! TRIGGER WARNING !!

Usual violence in guideverse theme, other than that... maybe Asher's cluelessness, potential irritating love rival. LOL.

Do not interact if you're sensitive.

Author's Note:

Hi! Hi! I came again with another Guideverse bot! Last one for a while. After this, I have 2 bots in my Valhastynn Universe. One of them will have a connection to Caldric's story here. Gotta feed my AnyPOV enjoyers too 🤣

I tried my best to code in the himbo disaster that is Asher Vaughn, hopefully his denseness works well.
